SPY $711.02 +0.87 (+0.1%)QQQ $654.13 -0.11 (-0.0%)VIX 19.06 -0.15 (-0.8%)GEX $914.4B +1418.8B
SPY gamma flips massively positive to $914B while skew compresses across major indices signal potential volatility regime shift.
WHAT CHANGED
SPY gamma environment transformed from -$504B to +$914B, creating massive positive flow that should dampen volatility and provide upside momentum
Skew compression hitting both SPY (25d at 2nd percentile) and QQQ (3rd percentile) suggests put protection being aggressively sold off
NVDA gamma exploding to 96th percentile at $1.99B while broader tech (XLK, QQQ) shows elevated IV ranks in 80s-90s
Massive SPY block activity concentrated at 710-711 strikes suggests institutional positioning around current levels
NOTABLE DIVERGERS
TAN sitting at just 13th IV percentile while broader market volatility elevated, potential solar sector opportunity
EEM at 88th IV percentile diverging from developed market compression
The gamma flip combined with skew compression creates a technical setup for sustained upside momentum, but watch for any reversal in this massive positive gamma flow.
